TestCase z4Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_p1 = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_p1, t1.p1, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.p1 = follow_case_p1;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element before processing
    if (follow_case.n > 0) {
        // Operation: divide all elements by 3.0
        for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
            // Denominator 3.0 is non‑zero, but check for safety
            if (3.0 != 0.0) {
                follow_case.p1[i] /= 3.0;
            }
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
